quick_reference.logline: A dead heiress returns under a false name to reclaim her empire in public.
quick_reference.protagonist_snapshot: Nora uses public rooms like a battlefield.

adaptation_positioning.core_hook: The presumed-dead heiress walks into her family's gala under another name and starts dismantling their power in front of cameras.
adaptation_positioning.audience_positioning: Female-skewing overseas short-drama audience seeking status reversal, revenge payoff, and high-tension romance.
adaptation_positioning.similarity_avoidance_direction: Shift conflict into public elite venues, boardroom legitimacy warfare, and fast alliance pressure.

season_outline.story_premise: The real heiress returns under an alias to destroy the lie holding her cousin on the throne.
season_outline.main_conflict: Nora must win legitimacy in public before the board can erase her again.

arc_segments.goal: False-name return, first public reversal, and male lead enters the war.
Alliance deepens, public wins stack, evidence becomes addictive.
Betrayal, false defeat, and villain pressure closes in from all sides.
Public truth revealed, board collapses, Nora reclaims power without surrender.

major_twists: Adrian knows Eva is lying earlier than he admits — and chose to protect her anyway.
The forgery ring reaches the board, implicating a director Nora initially trusted.
Nora's legal identity was erased through a document Nora's own father signed under duress.
season_outline.final_payoff: Nora reclaims her name in public, with Adrian beside her by choice — not contract.

episode_outlines.title: Back From the Grave
episode_outlines.logline: Nora returns to the Hale charity gala as Eva Stone and survives Celia's first public strike.
episode_outlines.core_event: Celia publicly humiliates Eva without knowing who she is.
episode_outlines.turn: Adrian notices Eva knows family-only information no outsider should have.
episode_outlines.emotional_goal: Audience feels the pleasure of watching a predator underestimate the wrong person.
episode_outlines.relationship_shift: Nora and Adrian move from strangers to mutual threat — he is watching her now.
episode_outlines.antagonist_pressure: Celia deploys social exclusion to remove Eva from the gala's power circle.

satisfaction_beat.description: Nora deflects Celia's public dismissal with a single line that leaves Celia with no clean move.

end_hook.hook_out: A camera catches the scar on Nora's wrist — the mark only the real heiress had.

episode_outlines.title: The Auction Trap
episode_outlines.logline: Nora weaponizes a charity auction to expose one layer of forged legitimacy.
episode_outlines.core_event: The family seal and a forged ledger entry collide in public view.
episode_outlines.turn: A longtime donor questions Celia's legitimacy out loud — the first crack in the wall.
episode_outlines.emotional_goal: Audience feels that Nora is already three steps ahead of everyone in the room.
episode_outlines.relationship_shift: Adrian moves from observer to cautious participant — he asks Nora a direct question.
episode_outlines.antagonist_pressure: Celia deploys a loyalist director to undercut Eva's credibility with the donors.

satisfaction_beat.description: The forged seal is flagged publicly, forcing Celia to apologize to the room while Eva watches.

end_hook.hook_out: The board is forced to ask who Eva really is — and someone in the room already knows.

season_hook_map.hook_direction: Who is Eva Stone really — and does Adrian already know?
Why is Adrian investing in Nora's war — and what does he want from it?
Who helped erase Nora's legal identity — and can the truth survive the institution?
Who is left standing when the truth finally goes fully public?

episode_hook_map.hook_out: A camera catches the scar on Nora's wrist — the mark only the real heiress had.
The board is forced to ask who Eva really is — and someone in the room already knows.

paywall_map.beat: A witness confirms Nora knew a family protocol no outsider could ever know.
paywall_map.viewer_task: Is Eva actually Nora — and will Adrian use that knowledge to help or destroy her?

paywall_map.beat: Adrian signs the alliance deal, then discovers Nora withheld a critical piece of the evidence chain.
paywall_map.viewer_task: Will Adrian walk away — or is he in too deep to leave?

paywall_map.beat: The board strips Eva of all public standing using the forged identity Celia planted six months earlier.
paywall_map.viewer_task: Has Nora lost everything — or is this the moment she finally burns the whole house down?

paywall_map.beat: The erased document surfaces live on broadcast — signed by Nora's father under duress.
paywall_map.viewer_task: Will the truth survive the institution's last attempt to bury it?
